insights: AI/ML integration is now table stakes for all senior engineers, not just specialist roles.
Full-stack proficiency with cloud acumen is critical — React, PHP, Laravel, REST APIs combined with AWS.
Leadership extends beyond code — people management and documentation skills mentioned 10+ times this week.
post:
AI/ML, PHP and React, and Cloud AWS are the top tech skills in demand this week. Senior engineers need full-stack versatility and strong product leadership to thrive. PHP continues to prove its enduring value despite legacy narratives.

#AIAutomation #SoftwareEngineering #WomenInTech #MakeAutomation #OpenToWork
